title: Type-Safe Gameplay Event Bus
description: Implement a typed event bus that allows unrelated gameplay systems to communicate without direct references.
requirements: Events must use strongly typed payloads.
Subscribers must be able to register and unregister safely.
Duplicate subscription behaviour must be explicitly defined.
Publishing with no listeners must be safe.
One failing listener must not prevent remaining listeners from being called.
constraint: The primary manager class must remain below 150 lines.
stretchGoal: Write at least three unit tests covering normal behaviour, an edge case, and invalid input.
